hero_h1: Innovation is not just about Growth. It's about Life.
hero_p: We are redefining how we handle the most certain part of our existence. From preparation and structure to conscious legacy and dignified remembrance.
why_p: Most people associate innovation with speed and the future, rarely with protection or remembrance. But when important decisions or information are missing, it creates uncertainty and emotional burden for loved ones. We believe preparation is not a niche topic—it's a responsibility we all share.
eco_subtitle: A complete digital platform for every stage.
p1_desc: Take control of your future today. Securely organize your legal documents, assets, and final wishes. Ensure your voice is heard and your affairs are in order before they are ever needed.
p2_desc: Created by you, for them. Deciding what remains: your voice, personal messages, values, and digital presence. It's not just about preserving, but actively choosing what to leave behind.
p3_desc: Support for those left behind. When the time comes, we guide your family through the grieving process with emotional resources, practical check-lists, and the comforting messages you've prepared for them.
cta_p: We have the concept and logic. We are looking for technical partners to build the MVP. Secure storage, AI integration, and immersive web experiences.
desc_assets: "To get an overview of your assets and thus the potential estate, first list your active assets and then the liabilities."
desc_bereavement: Guidance for the journey after a loss and support for anticipatory grief before loss.
ber_anticipatory_desc: Support and preparation when a loss is expected. Focus on meaningful time, communication, and emotional readiness.
desc_will: Outline your wishes for your final will. Remember: In many jurisdictions, a valid will must be handwritten.
check_handwritten: I understand it must be handwritten
check_dated: I remember to date and sign
bio_inna: Dr. Inna Praxmarer is a visionary Seelsorgerin based in Switzerland and an alumna of HSLU. At Ready Legacy, she bridges the gap between emotional support and digital legacy. With a deep focus on human-centric planning, Inna ensures that the journey of remembrance is handled with empathy, dignity, and conscious care.
bio_viktor: Viktor Ralchenko is a Senior Software Architect and Co-Founder of Ready Legacy with over 20 years of experience in building large-scale enterprise systems. A specialist in .NET, Cloud architectures, and AI integration, he leads the technical vision of the platform. Based in Switzerland, Viktor is dedicated to creating robust, high-performance digital solutions that bridge the gap between technology and human needs.
bio_olga: Olga is a senior financial executive with over 25 years of experience in global banking and markets. She holds an Executive MBA from Stockholm School of Economics. As Co-Founder and COO of ReadyLegacy, she leads operations, strategy, and execution, bringing deep expertise in governance, risk, and large-scale organizational management. Based in Switzerland, Olga focuses on building a scalable and structured platform that brings clarity and control to digital legacy.
assets_indicative: All values are indicative estimates — not a legal valuation
security_desc: We take data privacy seriously. Your data is transmitted over encrypted connections (HTTPS/TLS) and stored on European servers. We never share your data with third parties.
tier_free_desc: All essential estate planning tools are free to use. Your data is saved locally in your browser. Create an account to save your documents to the cloud.
tier_paid_desc: Premium features include the Digital Legacy Vault and AI Avatar. Store memories, messages, and media for your loved ones. Secure cloud storage on European servers.
pricing_subtitle: All tools are free to use and print. Save to the cloud with Premium.
pricing_free_desc: Use all tools for free. Print documents anytime.
pricing_premium_desc: Save documents to the cloud. Access from any device.
pricing_family_desc: For the whole family. Shared vault and AI features.
desc_executor: Track all tasks that need to be completed before and after — organized, clear, and persistent.
lb_social_desc: Document your social media accounts and what you want to happen with them.
leave_behind_desc: Create personal messages, videos, and photo memories to be shared with your loved ones in the future.
legacy_type: What would you like to leave?
error_fill_all: Please fill in all required fields.

docs_need_create_desc: Use our step-by-step wizards to generate legal document drafts.

chat_welcome: Hello! I'm the **Ready Legacy Assistant**. I can help you with estate planning, legal documents, navigation, and more. What would you like to know?
chat_error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.

features_subtitle: No more scattered files, forgotten passwords, and unspoken wishes
feat_1_desc: Securely store wills, insurance policies, property deeds, and financial records in one encrypted vault.
feat_2_desc: Grant role-based access to your spouse, lawyer, or executor — they see only what you allow.
feat_3_desc: Record video, audio, or written messages for your loved ones — delivered when the time is right.
feat_4_desc: Our smart assistant helps you navigate estate planning, suggests next steps, and answers your questions.
feat_5_desc: When the time comes, we guide your family with emotional resources, checklists, and your prepared messages.
pricing_subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.
pricing_summary: Estate planning tools are free. Digital Legacy features start at 15 CHF/month. No hidden fees.
newsletter_desc: Get tips on estate planning, digital legacy, and updates from Ready Legacy.
hero_h1_new: All the pieces of your life — in one safe place
hero_p_new: Ready Legacy organizes your documents, preserves your memories, and supports your loved ones — so nothing important is ever lost.
quiz_subtitle: Take 60 seconds to find out your readiness score
quiz_q1: Do you have a written will?
quiz_q2: Are your important documents organized in one place?
quiz_q3: Does someone you trust know where to find your key information?
quiz_q4: Have you documented your digital accounts and passwords?
quiz_q5: Have you left personal messages or wishes for your loved ones?
quiz_result_low: There's room to improve. Ready Legacy can help you get organized step by step.
quiz_result_mid: Good start! A few more steps and you'll have full peace of mind.
quiz_result_high: Excellent! You're well prepared. Ready Legacy can help you maintain and share your plan.

mission_pillar_1: Organize your documents, assets, and wishes before they are needed. Digital vault, will builder, and legal framework tools.
mission_pillar_2: Create lasting memories — messages, photos, videos, and voice recordings for your loved ones.
mission_pillar_3: Support for families during bereavement — grief guidance, executor dashboards, and memorial spaces.
mission_swiss_desc: ReadyLegacy is designed with Swiss privacy standards at its core. Your data stays secure, compliant with nDSG and GDPR, and hosted on European infrastructure.

ber_card_2_desc: Connect with verified grief counselors, support groups, and communities who understand.
ber_card_3_desc: Step-by-step guides for administrative tasks, notifications, and formalities after loss.

tools_desc_will: Outline your will structure step by step
tools_desc_legal: Track living wills and advance directives

tools_desc_templates: Generate legal document drafts with guided wizards
tools_desc_legacy: Store messages, photos, and memories for loved ones

check_ber_support: Reach out to a grief counselor or support group
check_ber_selfcare: Prioritize self-care and basic physical needs
check_ber_memory: Create a memory book or photo album
ber_groups_intro: Connecting with others who understand your experience can be profoundly healing. Here are verified support groups:
impressum_purpose_text: ReadyLegacy is a digital platform for life planning, legacy preservation, and bereavement support. The platform is currently in development (MVP stage).
impressum_hosting_note: Data is processed on Cloudflare edge servers. For EU/Swiss users, data is primarily served from European edge locations. Database hosted on Neon PostgreSQL (EU region: Frankfurt).
impressum_disclaimer_text: The content of this website is for informational purposes only. ReadyLegacy does not provide legal, financial, or medical advice. All tools and templates are intended as organizational aids and do not replace professional consultation.
privacy_overview: ReadyLegacy ("we", "us") is committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights under the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (nDSG) and the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy_data_text: ReadyLegacy collects and processes the following categories of data:
privacy_data_local: Tool data (documents, assets, settings): stored locally in your browser and, when logged in, synchronized to our cloud database
privacy_data_auth: Authentication data: email address, name, and hashed password (or Google account link)
privacy_data_lang: Language and theme preferences: stored locally in your browser
privacy_data_sensitive: Sensitive data you choose to enter: estate planning information, medical directives, financial assets, personal messages, and beneficiary contact details
privacy_data_ai: AI chat interactions: your messages are sent to our AI provider (Anthropic) for processing and are not stored permanently by us
privacy_storage_text: Your data is stored in two locations: (1) locally in your browser's localStorage for offline access, and (2) on our cloud database (Neon PostgreSQL, hosted in the EU — Frankfurt) when you are logged in. Data is protected by HTTPS/TLS encryption in transit. Application-level encryption at rest is planned but not yet implemented.
privacy_subprocessors_text: We use the following third-party service providers to operate ReadyLegacy:
privacy_sub_cloudflare: Cloudflare (USA) — hosting, CDN, and edge computing. EU edge servers for EU/Swiss users.
privacy_sub_neon: Neon (USA, DB region: EU Frankfurt) — database hosting (PostgreSQL).
privacy_sub_google: Google (USA) — OAuth 2.0 authentication (only if you choose Google sign-in).
privacy_legal_basis_text: We process your data on the following legal bases: (a) your consent when creating an account and using our tools; (b) performance of a contract (providing our services); (c) our legitimate interest in improving our platform and ensuring security.
privacy_cookies_text: ReadyLegacy does not use tracking cookies or third-party analytics. We use essential browser storage (localStorage) for application functionality and a JWT token for authentication.
privacy_rights_text: Under nDSG and GDPR, you have the right to:
privacy_right_export: Export your data in a portable format
privacy_rights_local: To exercise these rights, contact us at info@readylegacy.ch. We will respond within 30 days. You can also delete locally stored data at any time by clearing your browser data.
privacy_retention_text: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion, all personal data is permanently removed from our database. Backup copies may persist for up to 30 days after deletion.
privacy_jurisdiction_text: This privacy policy is governed by Swiss law. The competent supervisory authority is the Federal Data Protection and Information Commissioner (FDPIC).
disclaimer_will: This tool helps you organize your estate wishes. It does NOT create a legally valid will. Under Swiss law (ZGB Art. 505), a valid will must be entirely handwritten, dated, and signed by hand. Please consult a notary or lawyer.
disclaimer_legal_docs: This tool helps you track your legal documents. The information stored here is for organizational purposes only and does not replace professional legal advice.
disclaimer_death_checklist: This checklist is based on Swiss procedures and may vary by canton or country. It is for informational purposes only. Please consult local authorities or a professional advisor for your specific situation.
disclaimer_chat: I provide general information only — not legal, financial, or medical advice. Please consult a qualified professional for specific guidance.
consent_checkbox: I agree to the Privacy Policy and confirm that I am at least 18 years old.
consent_and_age: and confirm I am at least 18 years old.
consent_required: You must accept the Privacy Policy to create an account.
terms_scope_text: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the ReadyLegacy platform ("Service"), operated by ReadyLegacy, c/o Dr. Inna Praxmarer, Switzerland. By creating an account or using the Service, you agree to these Terms.
terms_service_text: ReadyLegacy is a digital platform for organizing estate planning, legacy preservation, and bereavement support. The Service is an organizational tool and does NOT provide legal, financial, or medical advice. All tools and templates are intended as organizational aids and do not replace professional consultation.
terms_account_text: To use cloud features, you must create an account with a valid email address. You must be at least 18 years old. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities under your account.
terms_data_text: Your data is stored locally in your browser and, when logged in, synchronized to our cloud database (hosted in the EU). Data is transmitted over encrypted connections (HTTPS/TLS). You are responsible for the accuracy and completeness of the data you enter. We recommend regularly reviewing your stored information.
terms_liability_text: ReadyLegacy is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for: (a) the legal validity of any documents created using our tools; (b) decisions made based on information stored on our platform; (c) data loss beyond our reasonable control; (d) any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Our liability is limited to intent and gross negligence under Swiss law (OR Art. 100).
terms_death_text: In the event of a user's death, authorized persons (registered beneficiaries or legal heirs) may request access to the deceased user's data by contacting us at info@readylegacy.ch with a death certificate and proof of identity. ReadyLegacy reserves the right to verify the legitimacy of any such request. We do not act as an executor or legal representative.
terms_no_legal_text: ReadyLegacy does not provide legal, financial, tax, or medical advice. Content generated by our tools and AI assistant is for informational and organizational purposes only. Documents created on our platform (including wills, directives, and powers of attorney) have no legal validity unless separately formalized according to applicable law. Always consult a qualified professional.
terms_termination_text: You may delete your account at any time via your Profile settings. Upon deletion, all your data is permanently removed from our database. We may terminate accounts that violate these Terms. For paid plans, cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
terms_ip_text: The ReadyLegacy platform, including its design, code, and content, is protected by copyright and intellectual property laws. You retain ownership of all data you enter. By using the Service, you grant us a limited license to store and process your data solely for providing the Service.
terms_law_text: These Terms are governed by Swiss law. The exclusive place of jurisdiction is Switzerland. For consumers in the EU, mandatory consumer protection provisions of their country of residence may apply.
terms_changes_text: We may update these Terms from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated via email or in-app notification. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
login_forgot_desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
login_reset_sent: If an account with this email exists, a password reset link has been generated. Check the browser console for the link (email integration coming soon).
login_pw_reset_ok: Password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in.
hero_clear: Estate planning, digital legacy, and bereavement support — in one platform.
hero_sub: Store wills, powers of attorney, and asset lists. Record messages for loved ones. Access grief support when needed.
svc_ready_desc: Store your will, power of attorney, asset lists, and insurance documents. Step-by-step guides help you fill in everything correctly.
svc_legacy_desc: Record video and audio messages, upload photos, and write letters to family. Delivered when and how you choose.
svc_honored_desc: After-loss checklists (who to notify, what to cancel), grief counselor directory, and local support groups in Switzerland.
cta_final_desc: Start with estate planning tools at no cost. Add digital legacy features when you're ready.
dc_source: Based on the Pro Senectute guide for Switzerland
dc_p1_doctor: Call a doctor for the death certificate (Todesbescheinigung)
dc_p1_police: Call police if accident or suicide is suspected
dc_p1_employer: Notify employer of the deceased + your own (bereavement leave)
dc_p2_zivilstandsamt: Register the death at Zivilstandsamt (civil registry)
dc_p2_zivilstandsamt_note: Bring: medical death certificate, Familienbüchlein, ID of deceased, residence permit (if foreign national)
dc_p2_funeral_coord: Coordinate with registry: funeral date/place, burial type, publication
dc_p3_parish: Contact parish / spiritual advisor / funeral home
dc_p4_subscriptions: Cancel subscriptions: magazines, GA/Halbtax, phone, radio/TV
dc_p4_online: Handle online accounts (social media, email, cloud storage)
dc_p5_will_submit: Submit the will to the competent authority
dc_p5_witwen: Check entitlement to widow/widower pension (Witwen-/Witwerrente AHV)
dc_p5_waisen: Check entitlement to orphan pension (Waisenrente AHV)
dc_p5_bvg: Check entitlement to BVG pension from occupational fund
desc_checklist: A comprehensive guide for what needs to happen after a loved one passes — tailored to Swiss regulations. Track each step to ensure nothing is missed.
profile_beneficiaries_desc: People who will be notified and receive access when the heartbeat protocol is activated.
profile_no_beneficiaries: No beneficiaries added yet. Click "+ Add Beneficiary" to get started.
profile_demo_desc: Pre-fill all tools with sample data for demonstration purposes.
profile_reminders_desc: Get reminded to keep your estate documents up to date.
storage_warning_text: You are not logged in. Your data is stored only in this browser and will be lost if you clear browser data or switch devices.
legal_desc: All your essential legal documents in one place. Track their status and store location information for your heirs.
tier_free_desc_ready: All essential estate planning tools are free to use. Your data is saved locally in your browser. Create an account to save your documents to the cloud.
tier_free_desc_honored: Bereavement support tools are free — access grief resources, support groups, and practical checklists to help you through difficult times.
tier_free_items_ready: Asset Overview, Will Builder, Legal Documents, Death Checklist, Executor Tasks, Templates
tier_free_items_honored: Emotional Guidance, Support Networks, Practical Checklists, Grief Resources
tier_paid_items: Digital Legacy Vault, AI Avatar, Unlimited cloud storage, Priority support
